summary: PayPal donation feature testing - All frontend tests passed (13/13). Heart button on main map navigates to /about page. About page displays app info, currency toggle (EUR/BAM), fixed donation amounts, custom amount input, and PayPal button. Back navigation works. All previous features (map, search, categories, location cards, admin) continue to work correctly.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Feature uses static content and external PayPal.me links.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PayPal donation feature fully functional. Heart icon button on main map (testID='about-btn') navigates to /about page. About page shows app info (name, version, description), donation section with currency toggle (EUR/BAM), fixed amounts (EUR: 1,3,5,10 / BAM: 2,5,10,20), custom amount input, and PayPal button. PayPal button opens PayPal.me link via Linking.openURL (opens in external browser). Back button returns to main map. All previous features continue to work correctly.

frontend_tests_passed: Main page loads with heart button (testID='about-btn') visible on map controls
Heart button has accent color background (#D97757) and heart-outline icon
Clicking heart button navigates to /about page
Donation section 'Podržite razvoj' visible with heart icon
Currency toggle buttons visible (EUR and BAM)
Custom amount input visible and functional (testID='custom-amount-input')
Custom amount accepts numeric input (tested with '15')
PayPal button has PayPal logo icon
Back button returns to main page

paypal_donation_feature.app_info_section: ✓ Working - Shows app name, version, description

paypal_donation_feature.custom_amount_validation: ✓ Working - Validates amount > 0 before opening PayPal
paypal_donation_feature.paypal_button: ✓ Working - Blue PayPal-branded button with logo
paypal_donation_feature.linking_api: ✓ Working - Uses Linking.openURL to open browser
paypal_donation_feature.error_handling: ✓ Working - Alert shown if browser fails to open
paypal_donation_feature.back_navigation: ✓ Working - router.back() returns to main map
paypal_donation_feature.contact_section: ✓ Working - Email link with mailto: handler

existing_features.heart_button: ✓ Working - New heart button on map controls
existing_features.city_center_button: ✓ Working - Home button to center on Gradačac
existing_features.clear_search: ✓ Working - Clear button restores all locations
